---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    paper: a4
    margin:
      top: 1.5cm
      bottom: 1.5cm
      left: 1.8cm
      right: 1.8cm
---

```{=typst}

// ── Colours ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#let navy     = rgb("#1a1a2e")
#let mid-gray = rgb("#888888")
#let border   = rgb("#cccccc")
#let light-bg = rgb("#f5f5f5")

// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#let hline = line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)

#let field(label, width: 1fr, height: 0.65cm) = {
  box(width: width)[
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[#label]
    #v(1pt)
    #hline
    #v(height)
  ]
}

// ── PAGE SIZE: HALF A4 (receipt size) ─────────────────────────────────────────
// We print TWO receipts per A4 sheet — original + duplicate
// Each receipt block is contained below; repeat twice with a cut line between

#let receipt = [

  // ── HEADER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: 0.8pt + navy,
    inset: (x: 10pt, y: 8pt),
    radius: 4pt,
  )[
    #grid(
      columns: (1fr, 2.8cm),
      column-gutter: 8pt,
      align: horizon,

      // Left: Institute details
      [
        #text(size: 12pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[
          Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data Science
        ]
        #v(2pt)
        #text(size: 8pt, fill: mid-gray)[
          SARA Education Trust (Regd.)
        ]
        #v(2pt)
        #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#444444"))[
          Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan, Kakroi Road, Sonipat, HR – 131001
        ]
        #v(1pt)
        #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#444444"))[
          Mobile: 925 315 2024
        ]
      ],

      // Right: Logo placeholder
      block(
        width: 2.8cm,
        height: 2.8cm,
        stroke: 0.5pt + border,
        radius: 3pt,
        fill: light-bg,
      )[
        #align(center + horizon)[
          #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray, style: "italic")[SARA\ LOGO]
        ]
      ],
    )
  ]

  #v(6pt)

  // ── RECEIPT TITLE BAR ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: light-bg,
    inset: (x: 10pt, y: 5pt),
    radius: 3pt,
  )[
    #grid(
      columns: (1fr, 1fr),
      align: horizon,
      text(size: 10pt, fill: navy, weight: "bold", tracking: 1.5pt)[RECEIPT],
      align(right)[
        #text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#25272a"))[
          Receipt No.: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
        ]
      ]
    )
  ]

  #v(8pt)

  // ── PARTICIPANT DETAILS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr),
    column-gutter: 12pt,
    row-gutter: 6pt,

    field("Name of Participant", width: 100%),
    field("Date of Payment (DD/MM/YYYY)", width: 100%),

    field("Course / Programme", width: 100%),
    field("Date of Course", width: 100%),
  )

  #v(8pt)

  // ── PARTICULARS TABLE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: 0.5pt + border,
    radius: 3pt,
    clip: true,
  )[
    // Table header
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: light-bg,
      inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt),
    )[
      #grid(
        columns: (0.8cm, 1fr, 3cm),
        align: horizon,
        text(size: 8pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[Sr.],
        text(size: 8pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[Particulars],
        align(right)[#text(size: 8pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[Amount (₹)]],
      )
    ]
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)

    // Row 1
    // #block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt))[
    //   #grid(
    //     columns: (0.8cm, 1fr, 3cm),
    //     align: horizon,
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[1.],
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[Food Charges],
    //     align(right)[#text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]],
    //   )
    // ]
    // #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.3pt + border)

    // Row 2
    // #block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt))[
    //   #grid(
    //     columns: (0.8cm, 1fr, 3cm),
    //     align: horizon,
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[2.],
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[Accommodation Charges],
    //     align(right)[#text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]],
    //   )
    // ]
    // #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.3pt + border)

    // Row 3
    // #block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt))[
    //   #grid(
    //     columns: (0.8cm, 1fr, 3cm),
    //     align: horizon,
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[3.],
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[Registration / Programme Fee],
    //     align(right)[#text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]],
    //   )
    // ]
    // #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.3pt + border)

    // Row 4 (blank)
    // #block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt))[
    //   #grid(
    //     columns: (0.8cm, 1fr, 3cm),
    //     align: horizon,
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[4.],
    //     text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_],
    //     align(right)[#text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]],
    //   )
    // ]
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)

    // Total row
    #block(
      width: 100%,
      fill: light-bg,
      inset: (x: 8pt, y: 6pt),
    )[
      #grid(
        columns: (1fr, 3cm),
        align: horizon,
        text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[TOTAL],
        align(right)[#text(size: 9pt, weight: "bold", fill: navy)[₹ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]],
      )
    ]
  ]

  #v(5pt)

  // ── AMOUNT IN WORDS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Amount in words: ]
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[Rupees \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ only]
  #v(2pt)
  #hline

  #v(6pt)

  // ── EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: 0.5pt + border,
    inset: (x: 8pt, y: 6pt),
    radius: 3pt,
    fill: light-bg,
  )[
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Early Bird Discount:  ]
    #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
    #h(4pt)
    #text(size: 8.5pt)[Yes — Discount availed]
    #h(20pt)
    #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
    #h(4pt)
    #text(size: 8.5pt)[No — Full fee paid]
    #h(20pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Discounted Amount (₹): ]
    #text(size: 8.5pt)[\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]
  ]

  #v(6pt)

  // ── PAYMENT MODE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Payment mode:  ]
  #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
  #h(4pt)
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[Cash]
  #h(14pt)
  #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
  #h(4pt)
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[UPI]
  #h(14pt)
  #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
  #h(4pt)
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[Bank Transfer]
  #h(14pt)
  #box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + navy, radius: 1pt)
  #h(4pt)
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[Cheque]

  #v(5pt)
  #field("UPI / Transaction / Cheque Reference No. (if applicable)", width: 100%)

  #v(8pt)

  // ── DECLARATION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: 0.5pt + navy,
    inset: (x: 8pt, y: 6pt),
    radius: 3pt,
  )[
    #text(size: 7.5pt, style: "italic", fill: rgb("#444444"))[
      Received the above amount towards the charges for the above-mentioned
      course / programme at Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data Science.
    ]
  ]

  #v(8pt)

  // ── SIGNATURES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 2.5cm, 1fr),
    column-gutter: 12pt,
    align: bottom,

    // Payer signature
    [
      #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Signature of Payer]
      #v(1.2cm)
      #hline
      #v(2pt)
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray)[Name: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_]
    ],

    // Official stamp
    block(
      width: 2.5cm,
      height: 2.5cm,
      stroke: 0.5pt + border,
      radius: 50%,
      fill: white,
    )[
      // #align(center + horizon)[
      //   #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray, style: "italic")[Official\ Stamp]
      // ]
    ],

    // SARA signature
    [
      #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Authorised Signatory — SARA]
      #v(1.2cm)
      #hline
      #v(2pt)
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray)[
        SARA Institute of Data Science
      ]
    ],
  )

  #v(6pt)

  // ── FOOTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  #block(
    width: 100%,
    stroke: 0.5pt + navy,
    inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt),
    radius: 3pt,
  )[
    #align(center)[
      #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray)[
        This receipt is valid proof of payment. Please retain for your records.  •  
        SARA Education Trust (Regd.)  •  Sonipat, Haryana – 131001  •  
        Mob: 925 315 2024
      ]
    ]
  ]

]

// ── PRINT TWO RECEIPTS PER A4 (Original + Duplicate) ─────────────────────────
// #receipt

// #v(10pt)
// #align(center)[
//   #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: border, dash: "dashed"))
//   #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray, style: "italic")[✂  Duplicate Copy]
//   #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: border, dash: "dashed"))
// ]
// #v(10pt)

#receipt
```
